title: BatchMetadata
description: Metadata record describing a single cannabis cultivation batch from propagation through to harvest and quality assessment. A batch corresponds to a cohort of plants grown together in a single room under a unified environmental and nutritional programme. This schema is used for batch creation, update, and export endpoints.

batch_id.description: Universally unique identifier for this batch. Generated server-side on batch creation. Immutable after creation.

batch_name.description: Human-readable batch identifier used on labels, reports, and in operator communications. Must be uppercase alphanumeric with hyphens only (e.g. 'BATCH-2025-001'). Unique within the facility.

strain.description: Cannabis strain name as used by the genetics supplier. Stored verbatim; not validated against a controlled vocabulary to allow new strains without schema changes.

room_id.description: Identifier of the grow room where this batch is (or was) cultivated. Must match a room_id configured in the facility manifest. Slug format for compatibility with Home Assistant area IDs.

start_date.description: Calendar date (ISO 8601, local New Zealand time) on which propagation began for this batch. Used as the epoch for all day-in-cycle calculations.

end_date.description: Calendar date on which the batch was harvested and processing began. Null until the batch reaches the DRYING or COMPLETE stage. Must be >= start_date when set.

current_stage.description: Current grow stage of the batch. PROPAGATION = seed germination / cutting rooting. VEG = vegetative growth under 18+ h photoperiod. TRANSITION = photoperiod flip (18h → 12h) and first week of flower. FLOWER = active flowering under 12h photoperiod. FLUSH = final 7-10 days with plain water, no nutrients. HARVEST = physical harvest event. DRYING = drying room (7-14 days). CURING = sealed jar curing. COMPLETE = batch closed; all quality data recorded.

target_yield_g.description: Target dry-weight yield for the entire batch in grams, set at batch creation based on strain data and room capacity. Used as the baseline for yield prediction accuracy metrics.

actual_yield_g.description: Actual dry-weight yield recorded after drying, in grams. Null until the batch reaches CURING or COMPLETE stage. Used as the ground-truth training label for yield prediction models.

quality_grade.description: Final quality grade assigned by the quality assurance team after laboratory testing and visual inspection. GRADE_A = premium (high terpene profile, >20% THC, no defects). GRADE_B = standard (moderate quality, some minor defects). GRADE_C = remediation candidate (low potency or significant defects). REJECTED = failed QA checks, cannot be sold. Null until quality assessment is complete.

planned_veg_days.description: Target number of days in the vegetative stage. Used for grow schedule calculations and to determine when to initiate the photoperiod flip. May be adjusted during the grow by operators.

planned_flower_days.description: Target number of days in the flowering stage from photoperiod flip to harvest. Strain-dependent; typically 56-70 days for indica-dominant varieties, 63-84 for sativa-dominant.

genetics.description: Genetic profile of the strain used in this batch. Used for model feature engineering and correlating environmental parameters with expected phenotype expression.

type.description: Broad genetic classification. INDICA = short-stature, dense buds, higher CBD ratio. SATIVA = tall-stature, loose buds, higher THC, longer flower. HYBRID = crosses with characteristics of both.

thc_target_pct.description: Target THC percentage at harvest as specified by the genetics supplier. Used as a feature in quality prediction models.

cbd_target_pct.description: Target CBD percentage at harvest as specified by the genetics supplier.

environment.description: Physical environment and infrastructure configuration for the batch. Captured at batch creation; changes to infrastructure mid-batch should be logged in the notes field.

room_dimensions_m3.description: Volume of the grow room in cubic metres. Used to normalise CO2 consumption rates and ventilation calculations.

num_plants.description: Total number of plants in this batch. Used for per-plant yield normalisation.

substrate.description: Growing medium used for this batch. Affects VWC sensor calibration offsets and irrigation scheduling parameters. ROCKWOOL = inert mineral wool slabs/cubes. COCO_COIR = processed coconut husk fibre. SOIL = organic potting mix. HYDRO = recirculating deep water culture or NFT.

lighting_type.description: Primary lighting technology used in the grow room. Affects PPFD calibration, heat load calculations, and VPD target adjustments. LED = full-spectrum LED bars/panels. HPS = high-pressure sodium (single-ended or double-ended). CMH = ceramic metal halide. HYBRID = mixed LED + HPS or CMH arrays.

notes.description: Free-text operator notes associated with this batch. Intended for significant observations, deviations from the grow plan, pest/disease incidents, or equipment failures. Stored verbatim; not used in model features.

examples.notes: Wedding Cake (Triangle Kush × Animal Mints). Day 45/63 flower. Trichomes 30% cloudy, 60% clear. Flush scheduled for day 56. Minor tip burn on 2 plants in corner — adjusted airflow.
Clean run. 97% of target yield. Lab results: 21.3% THC, 1.1% CBD. No pest or disease issues. Dehumidifier unit 2 failed on day 38 — replaced within 4 hours, no measurable crop impact.
